regime_fall.current_status: U.S. and Israeli air campaign has struck approximately 9,000 Iranian targets with operations nearing completion, while major amphibious and ground force deployments (USS Tripoli with 3,500 personnel, USS Boxer with 2,500 Marines, and 82nd Airborne preparations for 3,000-4,000 soldiers) position approximately 50,000 total U.S. troops for potential ground operations; the military-dominated regime under Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei continues rejecting ceasefire terms despite massive capability degradation, nationwide internet blackout, and ongoing but depleted Iranian counterattacks, though backdoor diplomatic engagement persists.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Pentagon finalized plans on March 29, 2026, for potential ground operations beyond air-only campaign, with 50,000 U.S. troops deployed in the Middle East region and mounting casualties (13 killed, 290 wounded).
